picks.match: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Liverpool
picks.reasoning: Liverpool remain one of the EPL's elite sides this season, and Brighton's recent form has been poor — they lost to Sunderland just a week ago. Ladbrokes have underpriced Liverpool's away win probability; at 2.15 with a true estimate of 54%, this is a clear 7.5% edge. Liverpool have the quality and motivation to take three points here.
